name: Sovereign's Rime
description: A city of theaters, where three great playhouses compete for audiences. The city's famous bridge, a stone arch so perfectly engineered that it has stood for five centuries. A great bridge with shops built along both sides.
atmosphere: The city's many church doors open and close in a constant rhythm of prayer and devotion.
government: A guild council, with seats based on guild membership size, governs all economic policy.

services.name: The Silken Tunic
services.description: A skilled tailor who can create or repair garments in any style.

services.name: The Country Stallion
services.description: A modest stable with a few reliable mounts available for reasonable rates.

services.name: The Floating Butterfly
services.description: A converted manor house now serving as an inn. The interior is surprisingly elegant.

services.name: Hilltop Provisions & Supplies
services.description: A family-run general store that has served the community for three generations.

services.name: The Burning Forge
services.description: An amateur blacksmith still learning the trade. Prices are low but the work is rough.

services.name: The Tipsy Chimera
services.description: A lively tavern with entertainment nightly. Minstrels, storytellers, and the occasional brawler.

services.name: Nerissa's Antiquities
services.description: A shop specializing in divination services and warded items. Prices are steep but quality is guaranteed.

notableNPCs.name: Aldren
notableNPCs.description: The Clothier of The Silken Tunic. Sharp-eyed and calculating, always looking for an angle.

notableNPCs.name: Ambrose
notableNPCs.description: The Groom of The Country Stallion. Friendly but forgetful, writing everything down in a ledger.

notableNPCs.name: Gralden
notableNPCs.description: The Host of The Floating Butterfly. Friendly but forgetful, writing everything down in a ledger.

notableNPCs.name: Francesca
notableNPCs.description: The Shopkeeper of Hilltop Provisions & Supplies. Talkative and friendly, eager to share local gossip.

notableNPCs.name: Camilla
notableNPCs.description: The Blacksmith of The Burning Forge. Cheerful and optimistic, regardless of circumstances.

notableNPCs.name: Caerthynna
notableNPCs.description: The Barkeep of The Tipsy Chimera. Secretive and private, reluctant to share information.

notableNPCs.name: Rurik
notableNPCs.description: The Hedge Wizard of Nerissa's Antiquities. Secretive and private, reluctant to share information.

rumors: A book found on a dead traveler contains a page that updates itself each day.
A dying courier clutched a bloodstained letter warning of an ambush on the king's road.
threat: A serial arsonist has been targeting warehouses, and the merchant guild is offering a reward.
